speaker: MATT
raw_text: If you'd like to do that, that would just be taking a short rest outside, probably not in the office proper.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Is that Draconian?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's Gnomish.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: To risking our lives. For money.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: How old is Nostoc? Just out of curiosity.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's hard to tell. Dwarves live quite a long time. He would be equivalent to like a human forties. Dwarven time, somewhere in his mid-hundreds.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Smells like its been in the barrel for a hundred years.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: It has been.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: This is excellent.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Tastes like two buck Chuck. (group laughs)

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I know him from Quimdendale.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What do you know of a Ballsac up in the tavern?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I'm sorry, what?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Do I have that right?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Ball, ball -

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Balgus.

preceding_turns.speaker: ALL - MATT
preceding_turns.text: Balgus.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Ah, Balgus, that's the brand of what you brought me."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You know what, I think we asked about him last time.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I think we did.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Also, may we take a short rest before we leave this facility?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yes, could we do that? Is this considered a short rest?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh yeah, that actually would be good.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You can as well. So, while you guys are taking a short rest, you're able to use any of your hit dice to heal up naturally.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Smells like its been in the barrel for a hundred years.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: It has been.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: This is excellent.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Tastes like two buck Chuck. (group laughs)

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I know him from Quimdendale.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What do you know of a Ballsac up in the tavern?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I'm sorry, what?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Do I have that right?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Ball, ball -

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Balgus.

preceding_turns.speaker: ALL - MATT
preceding_turns.text: Balgus.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Ah, Balgus, that's the brand of what you brought me."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You know what, I think we asked about him last time.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I think we did.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Also, may we take a short rest before we leave this facility?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yes, could we do that? Is this considered a short rest?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh yeah, that actually would be good.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: If you'd like to do that, that would just be taking a short rest outside, probably not in the office proper.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Understandable.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can leave and just sit down and get some rest.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: When we take a rest, can I look for Hieris?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Terrible kinds." He starts rubbing his chin for a little and goes, "We generally deal with the occasional goblin den we stumble across when opening new tunnels. That's part of the norm. Other nasty underground beasties. However, over this past few weeks, we've seen some real nightmarish things slither out of the shadows. Many goblins stitched together, like some kind of ball of screaming green lint."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Hi. You must be Hieris?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I am, I am. Foreman of this here fine mine."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Wonderful to meet you. I've heard wonderful things about you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Oh, have you! From who?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Uh, from Lord Greyspine himself.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Really? Oh. All right. Well, how can I be of service?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We were curious. I'm sure you witnessed all of those wonderful goblins and trolls and other nonsense coming out of the mine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Aye. Nasty lot. It always makes my weeks that much more interesting."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Weeks? So this has been happening for quite a while?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Unfortunately, at least five or six."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And what kind of monsters have you been dealing with?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Oh well, I have to stay here. Work, at least for the next six hours."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can I ask a question?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Ah, yes."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Not to you, to the other guy, Matt.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Ah, yes. (group laughs)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes, Laura?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: When we take a rest, do we get our spells back for the day?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Not a short rest. It has to be a long rest.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: All right, cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Which is why we're gonna take a proper nap.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We're gonna take a real nap?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I think we should go buy some potions and take a nap.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I think so.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: All right, this could be really bad. I mean, we're about to put the dungeons in Dungeons and Dragons.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Let's go get drunk and go to sleep then.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There you go.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: And stock up on some potions. Hieris, you've been so helpful.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Of course, I'm happy to."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: One last question.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "It doesn't have to be last. You're welcome to stay as long as you like. I don't get visitors to often up here in my booth."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You should come drink with us at the tavern.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: He reaches over and grabs this really awesomely intricate piece of clockwork on his desk. It's this brass, cylindrical piece that as he pulls out you hear this (tongue clicking), fring! And springs and things making strange whirring sounds. "Oh, I reckon it's about two hours from sunset."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Got it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: So, magic stuffs.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Let's go find them.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So wait-- it seems like they really don't want you in their door. It seems very heavily guarded. So what's our plan, we just going to try again?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well it was nighttime before. Maybe they'll be more--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We're gonna do what we always do  wing it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We're gonna try it again, except we're gonna watch this time. It'll be fun.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There you go.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Let's do it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I walk back to the door, because we're all just standing outside the door.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Correct.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I walk back to Hieris's door and knock on it and poke my head in. Hieris, I'm sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You catch him with a handful of dried fruit, "Hmph! Hi!"

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Just a quick question. We have no fucking idea what time it is. Because we usually use the sun. Do you know what hour it is? Are businesses open at the moment?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "This is the one who would-be attacked our home abode not more than a few hours ago."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Hello!

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I'm waving. Hello.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Opens the door, comes out. You now see this dwarven figure hunched, very, very old, with a long, very, very well-crafted brass staff, looks like a black or purple gem at the top. Spectacles at the tip of its nose. And it begins to kind of shift its way over towards you. (breathes heavily)

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Watch out for that rune. It's still on.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I think he knows that. (laughing)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Eventually making its way.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: He's coming towards us?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes. Walks right to the edge of the sigil. Puts his hand up, and the unseen servant vanishes. He goes, "So, you have my attention."

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Well, it's a pleasure to meet you. My name's Tiberius Stormwind, and these are my friends.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He puts his hand up and there's no sound coming out of your mouth. (Travis laughs)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Maybe we should listen.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Eight. He goes, "I've been practicing the arcane arts for over 250 years."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Smiles for a second as he looks at you and goes, "Ah, how nice to meet you. Where are you from?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (bad Scottish accent) Oh, hello. (group laughs)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, shit. (Liam speaks in Swedish-accented gibberish)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ya, from Sweden.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm gonna choke on a chip. (coughs)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Keyleth is not good at this.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Roll with it player, roll with it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I hail from the mountains up north.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: She had an accident on the way over here. We were hoping maybe--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Roll a persuasion roll with disadvantage. (all talking and laughing)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You. Roll with disadvantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Let the dice act better than us tonight, please. (group laughs)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (high-pitched voice) Oh, hello!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wait, persuasion--I don't have--oh, wait. I have a zero. Eight.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's your first roll. Now roll again.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I have advantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, you have disadvantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, disadvantage. So eight.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "That's the first true thing you've said since you've called me out of my home."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Roll a persuasion roll with disadvantage. (all talking and laughing)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You. Roll with disadvantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Let the dice act better than us tonight, please. (group laughs)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (high-pitched voice) Oh, hello!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wait, persuasion--I don't have--oh, wait. I have a zero. Eight.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's your first roll. Now roll again.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I have advantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, you have disadvantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, disadvantage. So eight.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Eight. He goes, "I've been practicing the arcane arts for over 250 years."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And I've been practicing my Cornwall accent for five minutes. Shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He raises his hand, and the Alter Self spell dissipates. Where stands Keyleth.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh Keyleth, you've been lying to us this whole time? (Travis laughs)

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Who are you?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We thought you were a dwarf.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Vax steps forward, steps in front of Keyleth and says, Good sir dwarf. Clearly we are idiots. We are--

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Well. They didn't have one." (Travis and Sam laugh) "And I found there was perhaps money to be made in starting one. I've been here for over a hundred years."

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Groovy!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, we were just there.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We were just there.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Nag champa.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You walk inside. There's not a lot of folks inside looking about the establishment. But there is one person sitting at the front desk, which is a beautiful long oak table with a red trim that hangs to the ceiling. Not a dwarf, actually. What you see there appears to be an elven individual, sitting at wait, hair pulled back behind the ears. Very, very slight, thin build. And smiles as you enter and says, "Welcome to my establishment, may I help you?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We both stand a little taller, and try to look more noble.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Hello.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yes."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's a beautiful shop you have. It's so startling to find an elven establishment here in the middle of Kraghammer. How did this come about?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right. So you guys go to sleep. Wake up the next morning fully healed, spells restored, well rested and ready for the day. You think it's day. It's hard to tell. Still, this underground circumstance is really messing with you guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It was a terrible roll.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's been a bad day for rolls. It's been bad day for rolling.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Fresh start in the morning.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, tomorrow is the day that it counts, because that's when we begin to crack some heads.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: When we could die.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Out with this system, new dice.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: To be fair, it's been a long day. I'm still bleeding everywhere.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Should we rest and get on with it?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Let's do it!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Or should we visit some whorehouses?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Nah, let's sleep.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Let's just sleep tonight.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Just sleep and go.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, they're still tired from the other night.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh yes, one of them battered me quite--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I don't know what this is.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's me getting beaten up by a whore dwarf.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, it's you getting the elbow drop.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: She's giving you the Randy Savage from the bedpost.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh yeah! (crosstalk)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We're sleeping now.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You make your way into the mine proper. It goes back for a good 10 minutes of walking and of winding. You can see the actual track of the minetrack leading around. You come upon a couple of dwarves that look over their shoulders begrudgingly at you guys as you pass going, "Hey? Eh, shh," and go right back into mining whatever remains in the inside of this. It looks like this portion of the mine has been nearly picked clean. The dwarves that are in there are probably just wasting time to get their pay for the day. You go further back and eventually it opens up. I think I have the map available.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yep.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Acknowledging the orders they received from Lord Greyspine.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, Trinket's with us.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Trinket has come along with you.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Trinket the bear, Trinket the bear.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I just saw that, don't forget Trinket. I didn't forget Trinket.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I assume Trinket comes with you unless you say otherwise.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: In general.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Are they especially bowing to Scanlan the snake slayer?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) No. (group laughs)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No love!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They're busy working.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And fair play to the gnome, but they're dwarves.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. They see that crap all the time.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Where you can see there were struggles that apparently occurred. You can see slash marks on the ground. You can see bodies, or the impacts of bodies where some of these dwarves have been pulled away. A few minutes later, you can see tracks, dwarven tracks, of bodies being pulled and dragged, not in the direction they're going, but further down the tunnel.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can I look for goblin tracks down here and follow those?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) You can attempt another investigation check.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Why don't we just ask the dwarves where they were getting the bodies?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You're gonna roll crap. You're gonna roll crap.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Don't curse me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Please don't do that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What am I, what is it? That I add it to?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Investigate.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Perception?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Investigate. But you advantage on the roll, because you're a ranger, tracking.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh sweet. Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Why don't we just ask?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well that's good, okay. Let's go with a 17.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 17, alright. So as you guys are going to ask somebody about this, your ranger gets down and begins inspecting the floor.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I see things!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: So, this tunnel, pitch black. There's no light source aside from the one that you're creating. You guys push forward. And push forward, following the tracks. And push forward. And the the tunnel winds and winds and descends. And winds and descends. About two hours-- [Laura, Marisha, Travis, and Sam] What?!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Wings.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: They're being used like skateboards. (group laughs)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Legolas style.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Who and what are those?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: This is 2015.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Is there any residue?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wow, if only we had asked some dwarves what's been going on down here.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Is there any residue, blood?

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: We already know.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Green, red, black.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: From the dragging marks, there is no blood. There's no signs of them dragging dead bodies off, at least.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Does it look like they struggled?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, there's no struggle either.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh crap, fire.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What about the walls? How close are the walls?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The walls here for this tunnel are about 15, 20 feet in width. And about 10, 15 feet high.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Are there any scratch marks or anything like that on the walls?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Let's stop dicking around and go into that mine.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Might as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We go further.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You push further in. (Liam imitates sword being drawn)

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Steadily declining and winding as it progresses. Three hours go by. This tunnel goes extremely deep. Whatever managed to dig its way up here came from pretty far under this mine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, there's no struggle either.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh crap, fire.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What about the walls? How close are the walls?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We go further.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You push further in. (Liam imitates sword being drawn)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So, this tunnel, pitch black. There's no light source aside from the one that you're creating. You guys push forward. And push forward, following the tracks. And push forward. And the the tunnel winds and winds and descends. And winds and descends. About two hours-- [Laura, Marisha, Travis, and Sam] What?!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: --of following this tunnel with little variation.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Should've grabbed some dried fruit.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We got a ton.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: About four hours--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: At no point does it look like the bodies ever moved?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nope, no change in physicality. No sign of struggle.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: But there are the drag marks all the way?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And two hours ago, I started stealthing and taking the lead. When we're in the dark.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, go ahead and roll a stealth check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I thought I was tracking.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Whoo, that's a good roll. Yay, first good roll of the night.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, there we go. Your luck is changing now.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Changing it around.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Let me touch you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You feel pretty stealthy. You guys look like, wait, where the hell did Vax go?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh shit, I hope he didn't hear me just say that about him. Dammit.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh thank you, brother.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm having a serious Tom Sawyer island vibe.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I found him.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Looks fine.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: No. It is still. It is stagnant air. (Laura coughs) Even more stagnant now. Four hours of traveling deeper into this tunnel's path until--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: At no point does it look like the bodies ever moved?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nope, no change in physicality. No sign of struggle.

preceding_turns.text: But there are the drag marks all the way?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And two hours ago, I started stealthing and taking the lead. When we're in the dark.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, go ahead and roll a stealth check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Whoo, that's a good roll. Yay, first good roll of the night.

preceding_turns.text: Oh shit, I hope he didn't hear me just say that about him. Dammit.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh thank you, brother.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN

preceding_turns.text: I found him.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Looks fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: About four hours--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Are there any drafts? Do I feel any wind flows or anything like that?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: As the four hour mark of travel into this tunnel presents itself, the tunnel finally widens and opens. As the sound of distant water rushing reaches your ears.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm having a serious Tom Sawyer island vibe.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I found him.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Looks fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: About four hours--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Are there any drafts? Do I feel any wind flows or anything like that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No. It is still. It is stagnant air. (Laura coughs) Even more stagnant now. Four hours of traveling deeper into this tunnel's path until--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Anybody else have to go to the bathroom?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: He rolled, he rolled something.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no, he rolled.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And so, that is how I spent my 12th birthday.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Great story, Keyleth. And, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Let's see, what else.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Hey Scanlan, you kill me, I kill you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: There a great little cave alcove here, perfect for peeing in.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh brother, good to see you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: For everyone to pee.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Am I over here, or am I over here? Perhaps we could take a pee break here and proceed further into the mines.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I agree with that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's a good idea.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Do you catch my drift?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Be back here in about five, ten minutes, folks. So keep an ear out.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no, I have to go to the bathroom.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As Tiberius steps into this opening, the light cascades into this new cavern. A large, beautiful open space presents itself, a good 100-foot-up ceiling. From what you can see, a roaring river is now pouring out of the nearby rock, cascading over a cliffside into a waterfall down into this deeper, giant cavernous space.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What about the tracks?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The tracks continue in the direction of that river.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Into the river? Like it goes into the water?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do we want to step into the room fully?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Why don't we send--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm gonna stealth. I'm gonna stealth, too.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Stealth twins.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Do I detect any magic? Stealth twins, 2015.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You detect no magic. You roll stealth.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Let's go ahead and take a bio break--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: --as the mystery begins to unveil. (group laughs)

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I love a mystery.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It's now its turn. It's going to try and break your grapple.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: But all I have are the basic six.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right, what's the strength?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Five.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So that's what I do.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, roll the dice, add plus five. (group cheers)

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: It's 20!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Natural 20. (clapping) You reach forward and latch onto it with your claws and your teeth, onto the umber hulk.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Going for the throat.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Alright. So that's your first attack. You can go ahead while it's grappled and attack with the other strikes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm taking him underwater.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You pull.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh god, you're doing it, Keyleth.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Pulling him underwater.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's a waterfall, oh.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (imitates thudding) You both plunge underneath the water's surface. Take a big old breath right beforehand, and I'm going underwater.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Wait, can you let him go and let him drown?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, let him go, 'cause it's a waterfall.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No, I'm holding on to him.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: But Keyleth, there's a waterfall. It's fine.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It's now its turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Got him right in the ass. It just gets straight damage?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it gets a bonus on its saving throw, though. Or advantage. Which it makes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I get 3d10.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 3d10. All right, go for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It is no longer outdoors-only.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It gets a bonus for being outdoors.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: 11 damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 11 damage to the umber hulk. Which is halved. He made a saving throw, to a six.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Saving throw, mm.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Finish him. Cause you're having to avert your gaze. You're trying to work out this whole thing where you're all basically at a severe disadvantage fighting this thing, unless you want to be completely fucked over. All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Should have created sunglasses for him or something.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We have two of its eyes.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: As you do it, (snarls), looks down towards you and right before its gaze can meet yours, you yank back with all your might, basically scissoring and jagged drawing the blade up the back of its body. As you do it, (imitates vomiting) leaps forward. It's now-soft torso and belly left open from the armor plates being shot off, spills a number of its warm innards right onto Scanlan's body and form.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay, this is the flametongue.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It is considered flanking, because Scanlan is there. Oh yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Four plus two is six. (Sam sings along with dramatic music)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Two, three, fuck, four, fuck, seven, nine, 18, 24 damage. With the second knife, sneak attack into his ball sack.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: How do you want to do this? (group yells triumphantly)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I stick it in the back of his his spider nads. And rip it out his bum and out the back of him.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Gross!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And just spill it all out the bottom. (all talking at once)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm right next to him, it might spill on me.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That's all right, that's all right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As it's looming over Scanlan who's on his back, it's tearing into him and starting to gut him best it can. He's screaming from beneath. You rush underneath, tumble, bringing your dagger up and slam it right under the bottom of its abdomen.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Balls.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: That's your turn. It's now both of their turn. They both failed their saves with a two and a four. They're both still hacking and coughing in the stinking cloud. Uh, go bards. Vax, you're up.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, go for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Vines?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: First off, make a constitution save, 'cause you stepped into a stinking cloud. Unless you wanna move back here. There you go.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Not having control.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Laser pointer.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I do (mumbles). Okay. So that is... what is that? 22?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 22 points of damage. All right. So the bolt streaks from the cloud in the sky, slamming into this other duergar. As it sparks into the ground, you see bits of stone get thrown up from the sheer force of the bolt, doing a sincere amount of damage to it. Not enough to finish it, but it looks very, very fucked up. You can see part of its face is charred now, and it's reeling from the blast. Probably blew out its eardrums from the cacophonous blast of the thunder.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That's my turn.
